headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 23, 2026**
article:
The Atlanta Braves secured a 7-2 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Ozzie Albies leading the charge at the plate. Albies hit a home run (5) on a fly ball to right center field and finished with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. The Detroit Tigers edged out the Milwaukee Brewers 5-4 in a closely contested game, with Riley Greene leading the Tigers' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance, including 2 RBIs. The Chicago Cubs edged out the Philadelphia Phillies 7-8 in a thrilling matchup, with Brandon Marsh leading the Phillies with 3 hits, including 2 home runs, and 3 RBIs.

Several players have been impacted by injuries and availability. Dean Kremer, a right-hander for the Baltimore Orioles, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right quad strain, effective retroactive to April 20, 2026. Other players on the injured list include Robert Garcia of the Texas Rangers, Francisco Lindor of the New York Mets, Dylan Dodd of the Atlanta Braves, Bryan Hoeing of the San Diego Padres, Wyatt Langford of the Texas Rangers, Max Lazar of the Philadelphia Phillies, and J.T. Realmuto of the Philadelphia Phillies.

There have been several trades and roster movements in the past 24 hours. The Colorado Rockies traded 3B Nicky Lopez to the Chicago Cubs for cash, while the Houston Astros traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Chayce McDermott, and the New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash.

top_news.title: **Braves Take Down Nationals 7-2**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves secured a 7-2 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Ozzie Albies leading the charge at the plate. Albies hit a home run (5) on a fly ball to right center field and finished with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Brewers in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Milwaukee Brewers 5-4 in a closely contested game. Riley Greene led the Tigers' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance, including 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cubs Comeback Victory: Phillies Fall 7-8**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs edged out the Philadelphia Phillies 7-8 in a thrilling matchup. Brandon Marsh led the Phillies with 3 hits, including 2 home runs, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Padres Take Down Rockies in Thrilling 10-8 Victory**
top_news.summary: The San Diego Padres outlasted the Colorado Rockies in a high-scoring matchup, securing a 10-8 win. Mickey Moniak led the Padres' offense with a 4-hit, 2-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Orioles RHP Dean Kremer Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles right-hander Dean Kremer has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right quad strain, effective retroactive to April 20, 2026.

top_news.title: **Rockies Make Roster Move**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies traded 3B Nicky Lopez to the Chicago Cubs for cash on April 23, 2026. Lopez will now play for the Cubs.
